name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_tsrc_uvw_kpi19_stakeholder_events
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_tsrc' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_kpi19_stakeholder_events' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(try_cast(`createddate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`EventType-DateReceived` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`CustInfoEnqDetails-DateEventOccured` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`CustInfoEnqDetails-ResponseDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`CloseOutDetails-NoiseLevelAssessmentDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`CloseOutDetails-AgreedRectDueDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`CloseOutDetails-MediaReqRespDueDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`CloseOutDetails-CloseOut/ResolutionDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Current Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`KPI19_GeneralResponse_DueDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`KPI19_GeneralCloseOut_DueDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`KPI19_MediaReqDueDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`KPI19_Ministerial_DueDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`KPI_19_DueDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`KPI_19_Assessment_Date` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(try_cast(`createddate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`EventType-DateReceived` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`CustInfoEnqDetails-DateEventOccured` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`CustInfoEnqDetails-ResponseDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`CloseOutDetails-NoiseLevelAssessmentDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`CloseOutDetails-AgreedRectDueDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`CloseOutDetails-MediaReqRespDueDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`CloseOutDetails-CloseOut/ResolutionDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Current Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`KPI19_GeneralResponse_DueDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`KPI19_GeneralCloseOut_DueDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`KPI19_MediaReqDueDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`KPI19_Ministerial_DueDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`KPI_19_DueDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`KPI_19_Assessment_Date` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'createddate|EventType-DateReceived|CustInfoEnqDetails-DateEventOccured|CustInfoEnqDetails-ResponseDate|CloseOutDetails-NoiseLevelAssessmentDate|CloseOutDetails-AgreedRectDueDate|CloseOutDetails-MediaReqRespDueDate|CloseOutDetails-CloseOut/ResolutionDate|Current Date|KPI19_GeneralResponse_DueDate|KPI19_GeneralCloseOut_DueDate|KPI19_MediaReqDueDate|KPI19_Ministerial_DueDate|KPI_19_DueDate|KPI_19_Assessment_Date' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_tsrc`.`uvw_kpi19_stakeholder_events`

error.message:
[INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS] Insufficient privileges:
Table 'uvw_kpi19_stakeholder_events' does not have sufficient privilege to execute because the owner of one of the underlying resources failed an authorization check. SQLSTATE: 42501
